transcription.text: Hi, this is Amy from Clearview Auto Glass. I'm calling to schedule your windshield replacement. Oh great. Yeah, I've got a big crack running across the whole thing. I see the claim from your insurance. It's a 2022 Toyota RAV4, correct? That's right. Good news, your insurance covers the full replacement. No deductible on glass in your state. Oh awesome, I didn't know that. Yeah, it's a nice perk. We can come to your home or work. What works better? Can you come to my office? I'm at [ADDRESS]. Sure. We have Thursday or Friday available. Takes about an hour. Thursday morning would be great. We'll be there between 9 and 10 AM Thursday. Just don't drive it for an hour after we finish so the adhesive sets. Got it. Thanks Amy. You're welcome. See you Thursday.
transcription.summary:
## Call Summary

Amy from Clearview Auto Glass called to schedule windshield replacement for a 2022 Toyota RAV4. Fully covered by insurance, no deductible. Mobile service at customer's office Thursday 9-10 AM.

**Action Items:**
- Dispatch mobile crew to customer's office Thursday 9-10 AM.
